title: The Wailing
tmdbOverview: A stranger arrives in a little village and soon after a mysterious sickness starts spreading. A policeman is drawn into the incident and is forced to solve the mystery in order to save his daughter.
synopsis: Released in 2016, The Wailing is a horror and mystery film from South Korea and United States. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
